title: Immersive Cooking & Farming
description: An Immersive Engineering addon adds multiblock for Farmer's Delight/Let's Do Series Automation
body:
**Currentry, This mod still WIP, It may contain bugs and unfinished features**
# Immersive Cooking & Farming

**Immersive Cooking & Farming** is an addon for _Immersive Engineering_ that introduces industrial-grade kitchen appliances to your world. Automate your food production with stylish multiblock structures that fit perfectly into your factory aesthetics.

## ✨ Features

### 🍲 Industrial Cookpot

A heavy-duty machine for mass-producing stews and soups.

*   **Energy**: Powered by Redstone Flux (RF/FE).
*   **Compatibility**: Fully compatible with **Farmer's Delight** Cooking Pot recipes!
*   **Automation**: Supports item inputs/outputs via conveyor belts or pipes.

### 🍖 Grill Oven

A large-scale smoker for processing meats and other smokable items.

*   **Fuel**: Powered by solid fuel (Coal, Charcoal, Coke, etc.).
*   **Capacity**: Cooks up to **3 items simultaneously**.
*   **Efficiency**: Perfect for bulk cooking operations.

## 📦 Dependencies

*   **Required**: [Immersive Engineering](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-engineering)
*   **Highly Recommended**: [Farmer's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight) (Enables rich recipe compatibility)

## ✨Planned Features

*   **Let's Do Compats**: Compat with Farm & Charm, and some let's do series mod
*   **Let's Do: Vinery Compats**: Automated Wine Aginger
